setup2fa.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication

setup2fa.downloadContentTitle:
BACKUP CODES - AI VIRTUAL ASSISTANT

Save these codes securely.
Each code can only be used once.

hero.subtitle: It's not just a tool, it's your strategic partner who understands your documents better than anyone.

company.title:
The #1 Hispanic Agency
in the United States.
company.description: Founded in 2014, Curiman Brokers Group has revolutionized the financial market. Our mission is simple: empower the Hispanic community through knowledge and cutting-edge technology.

badgeCard.title: Hispanic Leadership
badgeCard.desc: Nationally recognized for our excellence and commitment to the community.

featuresSection.title: Curim AI Assistant
featuresSection.subtitle: It's not just a tool, it's your strategic partner who understands your documents better than anyone.

upload.title: Instant Upload
upload.desc: Upload PDF, DOCX, and TXT files with just drag and drop. Everything is stored securely in the cloud.

search.title: Smart Search
search.desc: Find specific information within your documents using semantic search. Not just keywords, but by meaning.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.desc: Interact with your documents naturally. Ask your voice assistant and get accurate answers instantly.

history.title: Organized History
history.desc: Access a complete history of all your interactions and searches. Never lose track of your queries.

summary.title: Automatic Summaries
summary.desc: Ask AI to generate summaries of extensive documents. Extract key points and save hours of reading.

security.title: Robust Security
security.desc: Your documents and data are protected with military-grade encryption. Your privacy is our top priority.

agents.title: Insurance Agents
agents.description: Optimize policy management and customer service with instant access to critical data.

directors.title: Agency Directors
directors.description: Oversee corporate knowledge and accelerate new agent training.

compliance.title: Compliance Teams
compliance.description: Ensure every document complies with current state and federal regulations.

support.title: Customer Support
support.description: Resolve complex insured queries in seconds by consulting the knowledge base.

footer.description: Technological innovation for the Hispanic insurance market in the United States.
footer.copyright: © 2025 CURIM AI. Powered by Curiman Brokers Group.
